//: Copy into VS Code user settings (%APPDATA%\Code\User\settings.json). FIM autocomplete -> local FIM server (serving/start-fim.ps1 on :8012); editor chat -> llama-swap (:8080); RAG embeddings -> the CPU embed server (serving/start-embed.ps1 on :8090, started by `doki up`). If your llama.vscode build names the embeddings setting differently, point that setting at :8090.
